title: tetraberlinia polyphylla
intro: Tetraberlinia polyphylla, also known as the 'Bastard Ebony', is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tetraberlinia polyphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction, infusion, or topical application, and its roots, bark, or leaves are used to create medicines for various purposes.
